meta.description: OneSignal weekly marketing push campaigns for non-Pro users (e-commerce sellers).
meta.schedule: 7-day rotation, weekly recurring. Each campaign fires once a week on its assigned weekday at 20:00 user's local timezone.
meta.tone: SaaS, factual, dressing/AI generation focused, no promo/discount
meta.setup_instructions: In OneSignal Dashboard → Messages → New Push: assign each campaign to its scheduled weekday with 'Repeat: Weekly on [day]' setting. Rotation auto-loops forever.
